summary: Comprehensive testing of ACA Compliance Platform iteration 3 completed successfully. All major new features working correctly including employee profiles CRUD with 53 auto-generated employees, enhanced dashboard with workforce/eligibility/compliance modules, affordability calculator with 3 safe harbors, and actuary marketplace with 6 mock actuaries. Backend API achieving 100% test success rate.
passed_tests: Enhanced dashboard displaying workforce summary (53 total, 37 FT, FTE 48.83, Not ALE status)
Dashboard showing eligibility status (37 eligible, 0 waiting, 16 not eligible)
Dashboard showing compliance checks (MEC 100% coverage, MV 2/3 passing, affordability test)
Employee Profiles page with 53 employees generated and displayed correctly
Employee search and department filtering working
Employee table showing proper data (name, department, type, hours, eligibility, MEC status)
Individual employee profile pages with comprehensive details (Adam Murphy example)
Employee compliance dashboard showing eligibility, MEC, MV, affordability, subsidy status
Affordability Calculator with form inputs and 3 safe harbor results
Actuary Marketplace showing 6 actuaries with search/sort functionality
All navigation items accessible (Dashboard, Employees, ALE, MEC, MV, Affordability, Plans, Certifications, Actuary Market)
Backend API endpoints all passing (40/40 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Employee profiles generation API working correctly
Enhanced dashboard API returning proper workforce and compliance data
Affordability calculation API with all 3 safe harbor methods
Actuary marketplace API with 6 hardcoded actuaries

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and integrations working correctly)
